description: Fix 22 test failures in 4 new pack build scripts
task:
Fix 22 test failures in the 4 new build scripts: build_azure_lighthouse_pack.py, build_fabric_graphql_expert_pack.py, build_security_copilot_pack.py, build_sentinel_graph_pack.py.

For each script:
1. Replace local def load_urls with: from wikigr.packs.utils import load_urls
2. Narrow all except Exception to specific types like requests.RequestException, json.JSONDecodeError
3. Add DB path safety guard before any shutil.rmtree call - assert the path contains data/packs
4. Build all 4 packs by running each script

After fixes, run: uv run pytest tests/ --timeout=60 --no-cov -q and verify 0 failures.
